title: AffectedEntriesResult
description: Schema for the response of POST /api/rules/affected-entries. Transient communication — no embedded schema_namespace/schema_version. DESIGN_COMPUTE_PREP_PAGE.md §2.3.

libraries.description: Steam libraries that contain referenced entries.

index.description: Zero-based index into the steamlib array.

path.description: Steam library root path (directory, ends with '/').

game_count.description: Number of referenced games in this library.

mod_count.description: Number of referenced mods in this library.

games.description: Game entries referenced by the aggregated rule set.

name.description: Game display name from the database.

libraryIndex.description: Index of the steamlib this game belongs to (-1 if not found).

has_duplicate.description: Whether this appid appears in multiple libraries.

mods.description: Mod entries referenced by the aggregated rule set.

nickname.description: Human-readable short name for this mod.

path.description: Mod file system root path (directory, ends with '/').

libraryIndex.description: Index of the steamlib this mod belongs to (-1 if not found).

gameIndex.description: Index into the games array for the parent game (-1 if not found).

has_duplicate.description: Whether this mixed_id appears in multiple locations.
